message.content:
Do the following steps in order:

1. Switch git auth: `gh auth switch --user ryudae33`

2. Create a new private GitHub repo under ftech-projects org:
   `gh repo create ftech-projects/DSC_CHINA_NX4 --private`

3. Initialize git in the project folder, add all files, commit, and push:
   ```
   cd "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4"
   git init
   git remote add origin https://github.com/ftech-projects/DSC_CHINA_NX4.git
   ```

4. Create a .gitignore with these patterns:
   - bin/
   - obj/
   - .vs/
   - *.user
   - *.suo
   - *.exe
   - packages/
   - TestResults/
   - ndp48-x86-x64-allos-enu.exe

5. Stage all files: `git add -A`
   Then commit with message: "DSC_CHINA_NX4: initial commit — FRT/REAR NX4C assembly programs"
   Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

6. Push: `git push -u origin main` (or master, whichever branch was created)

7. After push, run: `gdrive-sync push`

Report the repo URL and results.

content.text: I'll help you set up the GitHub repository for DSC_CHINA_NX4. Let me execute these steps in order.

input.command: gh auth switch --user ryudae33

content.content: ✓ Switched active account for github.com to ryudae33

content.text: Now let me create the private repository:

input.command: gh repo create ftech-projects/DSC_CHINA_NX4 --private
input.description: Create private GitHub repo under ftech-projects org

content.content: https://github.com/ftech-projects/DSC_CHINA_NX4

cd "/c/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DSC CHINA NX4" && git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
DSC_CHINA_NX4: initial commit — FRT/REAR NX4C assembly programs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
input.description: Stage all files and create initial commit

content.text:
Excellent! Here's the summary:

## 저장소 설정 완료

**Repository URL:** https://github.com/ftech-projects/DSC_CHINA_NX4

**작업 결과:**

✅ GitHub 인증 전환 (ryudae33)
✅ Private 저장소 생성 (ftech-projects/DSC_CHINA_NX4)
✅ Git 초기화 및 원격 설정
✅ .gitignore 생성 (bin/, obj/, .vs/, *.user, *.suo, *.exe, packages/, TestResults/, ndp48 설치관리자, exe.zip)
✅ 892개 파일 커밋 (첫 커밋: 28ec116)
✅ origin/master로 푸시 완료

**참고:**
- exe.zip (118.29 MB) — GitHub 파일 크기 제한(100 MB)으로 .gitignore 추가하여 제외
- gdrive-sync push는 폴더명의 공백 문자로 인한 도구 호환성 문제 발생하여 수동 실행 필요
- 모든 코드/프로젝트 파일은 성공적으로 푸시됨

Master 브랜치가 origin/master와 동기화되어 있으며, 저장소는 운영 가능한 상태입니다.
